wordplay_note: A blessed man who doesn't know it
card_description: Herb Asher (meaning "Asher = happy/blessed (Hebrew)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Divine Invasion*. Music store owner on an alien planet who becomes vessel for the return of God to Earth. Name note: A blessed man who doesn't know it. The ordinary man as divine instrument — chosen without understanding. First appears in *The Divine Invasion*.

reference.brief: Music store owner on an alien planet who becomes vessel for the return of God to Earth
reference.significance: The ordinary man as divine instrument — chosen without understanding
